name: Moss Ridge Golf Club
about: Moss Ridge Golf Club is a full-service club committed to offering exceptional service and a distinctive golfing experience. The venue provides a scenic and challenging golfing experience to local residents and visitors while hosting a wide array of public and private gatherings. During colder months, the facility offers a continued golfing experience with its state-of-the-art TrackMan simulators, allowing players to enjoy golfing around the world from the comfort indoors. The club features a full-service staff trained to accommodate all golfing needs with an emphasis on prompt, personal service, and attention to detail.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan simulator technology for realistic play year-round
Full-service staff providing prompt and personalized attention to detail
Convenient location with both outdoor course and indoor simulator options
Scenic and challenging course conditions suitable for various skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service Bar and Grille available on-site
Full bar service available at the on-site Bar and Grille

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art TrackMan simulators for indoor golf

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Players can bring their own clubs or use the available equipment. The club provides 2020 Club Cars with Premium Seating and GPS units to guide club selection.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has an on-site Bar and Grille that offers food and beverages. External food and drink policies are not explicitly mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Specific timing for 18 holes is not provided. The venue recommends booking tee times online and mentions that simulator bookings are available for year-round play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically mention kid-friendly amenities or policies, though it does host family-oriented events and outings.
